label: Routing pack
blockedEffects: Must not re-score candidates inside the same admissible frontier. | Must not hide candidates for practice-visibility reasons.

label: Variance window pack
blockedEffects: Window fit is a hard band, not a hidden term inside `baseUtility`. | Window fit may not be counted twice through convenience scoring.

label: Service obligation pack
blockedEffects: May create ledgers or exception records only. | May not quietly hide, demote, or reorder candidates.

label: Practice visibility pack
blockedEffects: May mint acknowledgement debt or visibility deltas only. | May not suppress patient-offerable or direct-commit candidates.

label: Capacity ingestion pack
blockedEffects: Quarantined supply may never become bookable or patient-offerable. | Degraded supply may remain visible only for diagnostic or callback reasoning.
